name: Private School Bus Contract
recent_news: No verifiable news found. The listed website 'Skc-Networks.Net' does not appear to be a school transportation domain and may be unrelated; rural RR box address (Meshoppen, Wyoming County, PA) suggests a very small/possibly defunct operator.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm this entity exists as a school bus operator. Name appears to be a generic descriptor rather than a company name. Would require direct outreach to Wyoming County / Tunkhannock Area SD to validate. Low priority until existence confirmed.

name: Ezra International Entertainer
recent_news: Ezra Tours Inc. NY corporate filing dated May 19, 2003 (active). Operates as a travel/charter agency from 144-35 69th Ave, Flushing. No school bus contracts identified; primarily charter/tour operator.
fit_notes: Appears to be a Flushing-based charter/tour agency rather than a school bus contractor. Not a fit for Summit's school-bus tuck-in thesis; would require confirmation of school district contracts before further consideration.

name: Towne Bus Corp
owner_or_parent: Beacon Mobility (Audax Private Equity portfolio company)
principals: Jerome (Jerry) Marksohn (CEO, WE Transport/Towne Bus/Van Trans)
recent_news: WE Transport (parent of Towne Bus Corp and Van Trans LLC) was acquired by Beacon Mobility, an Audax PE portfolio company. Beacon Mobility itself reportedly in a second-round sale process per ION Analytics/Mergermarket (2025).
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in candidate - this is a major PE-owned platform (Beacon Mobility/Audax) operating 1,700+ vehicles, 2,500+ employees across 10 depots. The 40-employee data point in the source file is misleading; Towne Bus is one legal entity within a much larger consolidated platform. Potentially a competitor/comparable platform, not a target.

name: Global Transportation Inc
recent_news: No M&A or material news found. Site states 'more than 10 years of experience'; offers school bus, charter (10-1,000+ passengers), and driver simulator training across NY/NJ/CT.
fit_notes: Small Yonkers-based independent operator serving Westchester private schools (Windward, Scarsdale, Byram Hills, Eagle Hill). Attractive contract base of independent private schools and SPED-adjacent customers. Small size (~37 employees) and apparent founder-manager structure suggest plausible tuck-in candidate for Summit's NY Metro expansion; succession signal needs validation.

name: Star Trans Bus
owner_or_parent: Forest River Bus, LLC (Berkshire Hathaway subsidiary)
recent_news: StarTrans Bus is a shuttle/Type-A bus MANUFACTURER, not an operator. Acquired by Forest River, Inc. from Supreme Corporation in March 2014; production consolidated at the Starcraft Bus factory in Goshen, IN. Forest River Bus also recently acquired Trans Tech Bus (NY) to expand school bus manufacturing.
fit_notes: NOT a fit. StarTrans is an OEM shuttle/small school bus manufacturer (division of Forest River Bus / Berkshire Hathaway), not a student-transportation contractor. Should be excluded from Summit's target universe; potentially relevant only as a fleet supplier/vendor.
